Pip & the
Bad Seed

Powerhouse vocals, soulful musicianship, and a fresh take on the songs you know and love — creating unforgettable atmospheres for weddings, parties, pubs, festivals, and private events.

Who We Are

Powerful.
Soulful.
Unforgettable.

Blending influences from Pop, R&B, Soul, Country, and classic favourites, Pip and The Bad Seed deliver dynamic live performances full of warmth, energy, and personality.

From laid-back acoustic moments to lively crowd-pleasing sets, we adapt our sound to suit every occasion — making each performance feel personal, polished, and genuinely memorable.

Available for bookings across the South West and beyond.

Private Events

Birthdays, anniversaries & special occasions

Corporate Events

Summer parties, awards nights & team events

Weddings

Barn venues, country houses & beyond

Pubs & Festivals

Live venues & outdoor stages across the UK

Why Choose Us

What Sets Us Apart

🎤
Powerhouse Vocals
Powerful female vocals with emotional depth and versatility that connect with audiences of all ages.
🎸
Professional Experience
Professional live sound and performance experience across weddings, festivals, corporate events and more.
🎶
Tailored Setlists
Carefully crafted arrangements and setlists tailored to suit your event, atmosphere, and audience.
✨
Polished & Personal
A relaxed, approachable, and reliable service — we work closely with you to get every detail right.
🎵
Acoustic & Electric
Acoustic reworks and electric arrangements — we balance feel-good energy with moments that stop people in their tracks.
📍
South West & Beyond
Based in the South West, available for bookings across the UK. Check availability for your date today.

What We Offer

The Right Music
For Every Occasion

Weddings & Drinks Receptions
Private Parties
Corporate Events
Pubs & Live Music Venues
Festivals & Community Events
Acoustic Sessions & Special Occasions

Whether you're looking for live music for your wedding drinks reception, an intimate acoustic set for a private event, or high-quality entertainment for your venue, we pride ourselves on creating performances that feel personal, polished, and genuinely memorable.

We love creating a set that connects with audiences of all ages — balancing feel-good energy with moments that stop people in their tracks.
